request_payload.exposure_text: As someone who values both security and personal freedom, I've been following the debate on expanding domestic security powers. While some worry about overreach, it's important to remember that our intelligence agencies need these tools to stay ahead of evolving threats. The 2024 cyber attacks on critical infrastructure showed just how vulnerable we are. We can't afford to tie our agencies' hands with outdated restrictions. #NationalSecurityMatters #BalancedApproach
